name: list_directory
description: Lists directory contents. **Protocol:** Verify path existence BEFORE assuming structure. **Epistemic Mandate:** Confirm physical presence to falsify 'missing file' hypotheses.

dir_path.description: The path to the directory to list

pattern.description: Optional: Glob pattern to filter files (e.g., '**/*.js').

name: read_file
description: Reads file content. **Protocol:** ALWAYS read the context in the same turn as 'replace'. **Epistemic Mandate:** Treat your mental model as an incomplete suggestion until verified against literal file state.

file_path.description: The path to the file to read.

start_line.description: Optional: The 1-based line number to start reading from.

end_line.description: Optional: The 1-based line number to end reading at (inclusive).

name: grep_search
description: Searches for patterns. **Protocol:** Use to verify global assumptions. **Epistemic Mandate:** Search for counter-evidence to your current hypothesis (Falsification).

name: replace
description: Replaces text surgically. **Protocol:** 'old_string' MUST be verified in the same turn. **Epistemic Mandate:** Every edit is a hypothesis that the new code behaves correctly. Verify after execution.

file_path.description: The path to the file to modify.

old_string.description: The exact literal text to replace.

new_string.description: The exact literal text to replace 'old_string' with.

name: run_shell_command
description: Executes shell commands. **Fail-Safe Protocol:** 1. Secure all pipes (set -o pipefail). 2. Explicitly check each segment. 3. Use NON-INTERACTIVE flags. **Epistemic Mandate:** Commands are hypothesis tests. Scrutinize output (stdout/stderr) for silent failures.

name: codebase_investigator
description: Systemic analysis. **Protocol:** Investigate problems with 'Specific yet General' scope. **Epistemic Mandate:** Map mechanisms, not just symptoms.

name: ask_user
description: Asks questions. **Protocol:** Use to resolve epistemic blocks that cannot be cleared through research. **Epistemic Mandate:** Treat user input as high-priority data for hypothesis refinement.
